message.content:
@startuml
participant "Customer" as C1
participant "Customer" as C2
participant "BileMo" as B1
participant "BileMo" as B2
participant "Database" as DB1
participant "Database" as DB2

C1 ..> B1 : DELETE /users/{id}
B1 --> DB1 : DELETE FROM customer_users cu WHERE cu.id = ?
B1 --> C2 : [204 Response status code]

@enduml
